summary: Add EDT distance map as 3rd CNN observation channel; MLP agents auto-strip EDT channel to keep 11+2*N^2 observation (avoids noise from spatial features MLP cannot exploit). Env emits 11+3*N^2; agent._prep_obs() slices per arch.
changes: amr_dqn/env.py: precompute downsampled EDT map, append as 3rd channel in _observe(), obs_dim=11+3*N^2
amr_dqn/agents.py: MLP auto-strips EDT (11+3*N^2 -> 11+2*N^2); _prep_obs() slices in act/observe
why_split: Run3 (train_20260223_133849) showed all-3ch harmed MLP: SR dropped 1.0->0.8 on long, and all 3 MLP variants converged to identical policies. The extra 144 EDT dims act as noise for MLP (flat features, no spatial inductive bias). CNN benefits from EDT channel (CNN-PDDQN long SR recovered 0.5->1.0).
reproduce: conda run --cwd /home/sun/phdproject/dqn/DQN6 -n ros2py310 python train.py --profile forest_a_all6_300_cuda && conda run --cwd /home/sun/phdproject/dqn/DQN6 -n ros2py310 python infer.py --profile forest_a_all6_300_cuda

prior_runs.run2_new_collision: train_20260223_121627 (new collision r+half_cell, 2ch) — CNN-DQN/PDDQN long collapsed
prior_runs.run3_all_3ch: train_20260223_133849 (new collision, 3ch for all) — MLP degraded, CNN-PDDQN recovered
